predictedBugs: Rich markup misinterpretation in subprocess stdout/stderr containing bracket patterns — mitigated with escape() wrapper on all subprocess output lines
from rich import print shadows built-in print globally in module — any code path printing untrusted data could be misinterpreted as markup
Unknown color names passed to _c() would be silently ignored by Rich's markup parser — all colors verified against Rich standard palette
edgeCases: Non-TTY piped output — Rich handles this internally by stripping markup, equivalent to previous explicit isatty() check
Subprocess output containing ANSI codes passed through as-is — unchanged from previous implementation behavior
Empty strings in _c() produce valid but empty markup [green][/green] — matches previous behavior of empty ANSI-wrapped strings
